allowed_use: Static fixture validation, provenance, schema, row-count, date, and source-rights proof only.
forbidden_use: No live provider, bulk download, ingestion, canonical lake writes, signal scoring, candidate generation, alerts, broker calls, or state-machine consumption.
license_or_terms_note: SEC EDGAR data via data.sec.gov official public JSON API; automated access must follow SEC fair-access guidance.
rate_limit_policy: No more than 10 requests per second per SEC fair-access guidance; this fixture used one submissions request and stores a static tiny sample only.
